title: palicourea muscosa subsp. breviloba
intro: Palicourea muscosa subsp. breviloba is a plant species, also known as 'bitter leaf' or 'yerba amarga' in some parts of the world, within the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Palicourea muscosa subsp. breviloba include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems, among other uses. In traditional herbal medicine, the leaves of this plant are often prepared as teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
